title: Bolsius - 18 Scented tealights - Vanilla - Burning time of 3.5 Hours - Diameter 38 mm - Natural extracts - Contains Vegan Wax - No Palm Oil
features: Bolsius's Wanilla Tea lights burn for up to 3.5 hours and gradually spread their fragrance through the room, enjoy the slightly sweet, recognisable scent of creamy vanilla, with natural extracts and in three colour tones: white, ivory and yellow, combine the best quality with an irresistible fragrance experience - all within the comfort of your own home
Fill the room with the somewhat sweet, creamy fragrant taste of vanilla with a dash of caramel, an inviting fragrance for a comfortable and sublimely relaxed homely feeling

The mark of a quality candle is its long burning time and its use of the best raw materials, bolsius's scented tea lights don't smoke or drip, with the cotton wick of the tea lights being braided, the flame remains stable and no soot deposits or smoke arises whilst burning, bolsius's scented candles have been developed using natural extracts and spread their fragrance over a long time

Bolsius's tricolour collection combines scented tea lights in three different, natural colour tones with recognisable, familiar fragrances, you'll be enjoying reliable quality, a long burning time and a pleasant fragrance experience within the comfort of your own home

Since 1870, bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home, we do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet, bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses, it's how you can make every moment a special one, for yourself and for everyone around you
description: Product Description Bolsius's Vanilla tea lights burn for up to 3.5 hours and gradually spread their fragrance through the room. Enjoy the slightly sweet, recognisable scent of creamy vanilla. With natural extracts and in three colour tones: white, ivory and yellow. Combine the best quality with an irresistible fragrance experience - all within the comfort of your own home! Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not leave burning unattended. Extinguish the candle when leaving the room or before falling asleep. Remove wax remnants appropriately.
